hooks.command: i=$(cat 2>/dev/null); delta=$(printf '%s' "$i" | jq -r '.delta // ""' 2>/dev/null); printf '%s' "$delta" | grep -iqE 'approaching.*usage limit|resets? at [0-9]+:[0-9]+.*[AP]M|out of.*usage' && { mkdir -p /Users/dh/Project/orbit/.planning; printf '[%s] EVT=MESSAGE %s\n' "$(date '+%F %T')" "$i" >> /Users/dh/Project/orbit/.planning/usage-detect.log; }; exit 0
